Item 1. Business.

Our company designs and sells industrial equipment to manufacturing customers
across North America and Europe. Revenue is recognized when control of the goods
transfers to the customer, typically upon shipment.

We are investing heavily in artificial intelligence and machine learning to power
predictive maintenance features across our connected product lines. During the
year we deployed a large language model assistant to help field technicians
diagnose equipment faults more quickly.

The remainder of this section discusses ordinary commercial matters such as
inventory management, supplier relationships, and quarterly installment financing
options offered to certain customers. None of these touch on advanced technology.

Our research organization expanded its computer vision team to improve automated
defect detection on the production line, a core part of our AI roadmap.
